top_signals.title: CFTC Awards Five Whistleblowers $8 Million for Enforcement Tips
top_signals.summary: The US Commodity Futures Trading Commission said it will award more than $8 million to five whistleblowers who provided information that helped agency investigators recover funds for defrauded investors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
